documentation.title: Disallow Use Function
documentation.standard: Disallow the use of `use function` import statements, with or without alias.

code.title: Valid: Other type of use import statements.

code_comparison.code: use function _PhpScoperdd275a4cd119\Vendor\Sub\functionName; use function _PhpScoperdd275a4cd119\Vendor\Sub\functionName as other;
